overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a nighttime walk through a futuristic neon-lit urban plaza. The player moves through pedestrian areas, observes an underground garden through glass flooring, traverses an elevated garden walkway, and returns to the main plaza level featuring vibrant ground graffiti.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a futuristic urban plaza at night, surrounded by towering skyscrapers covered in vibrant neon signage. The wet pavement reflects the colorful lights as the player walks past a character in distinctive white hat and red pants. The atmosphere is dense with cyberpunk aesthetic, featuring scattered pedestrians and glowing advertisements.

cave-like garden with rocks, tropical plants and small waterfalls visible beneath the glass

segments.scene_description: The player walks over a transparent glass floor revealing a stunning underground rock garden with tropical plants and water features below. The scene transitions from the open plaza to a more sheltered overlook area, then passes a futuristic vending machine with glowing digital advertisements before returning to solid pavement.

segments.scene_description: The player traverses an elevated garden walkway featuring dense vegetation, mature trees with autumn foliage, and modern metal railings with integrated lighting. The path runs alongside a blue utility structure while maintaining views of the neon-lit city buildings in the background. The environment blends natural elements with futuristic urban design.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban plaza with graffiti ground art and glass floor features

events.description: descending from garden walkway back to main plaza level with colorful graffiti
approaching central stairs and glass floor sections while navigating around pedestrians

agents.ego_description: walking through the plaza observing the graffiti ground art and approaching the central stair area

rectangular glass panels set into the pavement showing the level below
staircase leading to upper level with green illuminated walls
elevated walkway or bridge structure spanning across the plaza

segments.scene_description: The player returns to the main plaza level featuring vibrant graffiti art covering the ground and additional glass floor panels. The area is more populated with pedestrians moving toward a central staircase. Overhead structures and neon-lit storefronts frame the scene as the walk continues through this dynamic urban space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a neon-lit futuristic plaza that transitions from open urban spaces to integrated natural gardens before returning to the vibrant city center. It begins on wet pavement reflecting towering skyscrapers and glowing advertisements, moving past pedestrians in a dense cyberpunk atmosphere. As the camera advances, the solid ground gives way to a transparent glass floor revealing a lush underground rock garden with tropical plants, passing a glowing vending machine before shifting onto an elevated walkway. This path winds through dense autumn foliage and modern metal railings, blending organic greenery with the distant blue utility structures and city lights. The scene finally descends back to the main plaza level, where the environment opens up to reveal ground-level graffiti and crowds of pedestrians moving toward a central staircase beneath neon-lit storefronts.
